name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX Exchange Traded Fund
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses of the TOPIX Index.The fund invests in the component stocks of the TOPIX and stocks which are scheduled to become such component stocks, and intends to construct and maintain the portfolio, which is similar in composition to the index.

name: NEXT FUNDS ChinaAMC SSE50 Index Exchange Traded Fund
summary: NEXT FUNDS ChinaAMC SSE50 Index Exchange Traded Fund is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that tracks the SSE 50 Index. It invests in a portfolio of stocks that mirrors the composition of the SSE 50 index, providing exposure to the 50 largest companies listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange. The ETF is managed by Nomura Asset Management.

name: Nikkei 225 Exchange Traded Fund
summary: Nikkei 225 Exchange Traded Fund is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that tracks the Nikkei 225 index. It invests in a portfolio of stocks that mirrors the composition of the Nikkei 225 index, providing broad exposure to the Japanese stock market. The ETF is managed by Nomura Asset Management.

name: Listed Index Fund China A Share Panda E Fund CSI300
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the CSI300 index.The fund targets all issues traded on the Shanghai and Shenzhen stock exchanges. The index is composed of the top 300 China A-shares based on market value and liquidity listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen exchanges.

name: NEXT FUNDS Ibovespa Linked
summary: The investment seeks to replicate, net of expenses, the Ibovespa Index.

name: S&P GSCI Energy&Metals Capped Component 35/20 THEAM Easy UCITS ETF A Capitalisation
summary: The Fund's objective is to achieve a return comparable to the S&P GSCI√Ç¬Æ Energy & Metals Capped Component 35/20 Total Return Index. In this respect, the Manager will use a method consisting in the synthetic replication of the Benchmark Index.

name: Nikko Nikkei225 Listed
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the Nikkei 225 Index.The index is a price-weighted average of 225 top-rated Japanese companies listed in the First Section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: MAXIS Nikkei 225 ETF
summary: MAXIS Nikkei 225 ETF is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that tracks the Nikkei 225 index. The fund offers investors exposure to a portfolio of the 225 largest publicly listed companies in Japan. MAXIS Nikkei 225 ETF is managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd.

name: ABF Pan Asia Bond Index
summary:
The Trust seeks investment results, before fees and expenses, that correspond closely to the total return of the Markit iBoxx ABF Pan-Asia Index (the √¢¬Ä¬úUnderlying Index√¢¬Ä¬ù).
To achieve the Trust√¢¬Ä¬ôs investment objective, the Manager will adopt a representative sampling strategy (i.e. a strategy investing in a representative sample of securities in the Underlying Index which have a similar investment profile as that of the Underlying Index), or a similar strategy, and invest the Trust√¢¬Ä¬ôs assets primarily in debt obligations denominated in China Renminbi, Hong Kong Dollars, Indonesian Rupiah, Korean Won, Malaysian Ringgits, Philippine Pesos, Singapore Dollars or Thai Baht (each a √¢¬Ä¬úAsian Currency√¢¬Ä¬ù), issued or guaranteed by government, quasi-government organizations or supranational financial institutions in each case as determined by Markit Indices Limited (the √¢¬Ä¬úIndex Provider√¢¬Ä¬ù) and which are for the time being constituent securities of the Underlying Index (√¢¬Ä¬úIndex Securities√¢¬Ä¬ù).

name: Nikkei225 Bear -2x ETF
summary: Nikkei225 Bear -2x ETF is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that seeks to provide twice the inverse (opposite) of the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 index. This leveraged inverse ETF uses derivatives to achieve its investment objective. It is designed for short-term trading and is not suitable for long-term investment.

name: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Leveraged Index
summary: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Leveraged Index is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that seeks to provide leveraged exposure to the Nikkei 225 index. The fund aims to deliver twice the daily return of the Nikkei 225. It uses derivatives to achieve its leveraged exposure.

name: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Double Inverse Index
summary: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Double Inverse Index is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that seeks to provide twice the inverse (opposite) of the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 index. This leveraged inverse ETF uses derivatives to achieve its investment objective. It is designed for short-term trading and is not suitable for long-term investment.

name: SMDS SMDAM NIKKEI225 ETF
summary: SMDS SMDAM NIKKEI225 ETF is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that tracks the Nikkei 225 index. It invests in a portfolio of stocks that mirrors the composition of the Nikkei 225 index, providing broad exposure to the Japanese stock market. The ETF is managed by Sumitomo Mitsui DS Asset Management.

name: SMDS SMDAM REIT Index ETF
summary: SMDS SMDAM REIT Index ETF is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that tracks a REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) index. It invests in a portfolio of REITs, providing exposure to the Japanese real estate market. The ETF is managed by Sumitomo Mitsui DS Asset Management.

name: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Inverse Index
summary: Daiwa ETF Japan Nikkei225 Inverse Index is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that seeks to provide inverse (opposite) of the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 index. This inverse ETF uses derivatives to achieve its investment objective. It is designed for short-term trading and is not suitable for long-term investment.

name: Rakuten ETF-Nikkei 225 Leveraged Index
summary: This is a leveraged ETF that aims to generate twice the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 Index. The fund seeks to provide investors with amplified returns based on the movements of the underlying index, targeting short-term trading strategies. It is managed by Rakuten Asset Management and listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: Rakuten ETF-Nikkei 225 Double Inverse Index
summary: This is an inverse leveraged ETF that aims to deliver twice the inverse daily performance of the Nikkei 225 Index. The fund is designed for investors seeking to profit from a decline in the Nikkei 225, with a magnified inverse return. Rakuten Asset Management manages the fund, which trades on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: iShares Core TOPIX ETF
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the performance of the TOPIX (Tokyo Stock Price Index). It provides investors with broad exposure to the Japanese stock market by investing in a diversified portfolio of companies listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. iShares manages this fund.

name: Listed Index Fund Japanese Economy Contributor Stocks
summary: This is an ETF focused on investing in Japanese companies that are considered contributors to the Japanese economy. The fund selects stocks based on their positive impact on the nation's economic growth. Listed Index Fund manages this ETF.

name: AMOne One ETF JPX/S&P CAPEX & Human Capital Index
summary: This ETF tracks the JPX/S&P CAPEX & Human Capital Index, focusing on companies that invest in capital expenditure and human capital. The fund provides exposure to Japanese companies recognized for their investments in growth and their employees. AMOne manages this ETF.

name: MAXIS JAPAN Proactive Investment in Physical and Human Capital 200 Idx ETF
summary: This ETF tracks the MAXIS JAPAN Proactive Investment in Physical and Human Capital 200 Index. It invests in Japanese companies that actively invest in both physical assets and human resources. The fund aims to capture the performance of companies focused on long-term growth through strategic investments.

name: Daiwa ETF Tokyo Stock Exchange REIT Index
summary: This is an ETF designed to track the performance of the Tokyo Stock Exchange REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) Index. The fund provides investors with exposure to a portfolio of Japanese REITs, offering a way to invest in the Japanese real estate market through publicly traded securities. Daiwa Asset Management manages this ETF.

name: MAXIS JPX-Nikkei Mid and Small Cap Index ETF
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the JPX-Nikkei Mid and Small Cap Index. The fund offers investors exposure to mid- and small-sized companies listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, providing a broader market view beyond large-cap stocks. MAXIS manages this ETF.

name: Simplex JASDAQ-TOP20 ETF
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the JASDAQ-TOP20 Index. The fund invests in the 20 largest companies listed on the JASDAQ market in Japan, focusing on emerging and growth-oriented businesses. Simplex Asset Management manages this ETF.

name: NEXT FUNDS Thai Stock SET50 Exchange Traded Fund
summary: The investment seeks to replicate, net of expense, the SET 50 JPY index.

name: NEXT FUNDS FTSE Bursa Malaysia KLCI Exchange Traded Fund
summary: The investment seeks to replicate, net of expense, the FTSE Bursa Malaysia KLCI JPY index.

name: TSE Mothers Core ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to replicate, net of expenses, the Tokyo Stock Exchange Mother Core Index.
 The index represents companies listed on the Mothers market of Tokyo Stock Exchange, with respect to market capitalization, turnover, profits and dividends in consideration of the situation, which consists of shares of 15 companies chosen by the TSE.

name: NEXT FUNDS Nomura Japan Equity High Dividend 70 Exchange Traded Fund
summary: This is an Exchange Traded Fund that focuses on Japanese equities with high dividend yields. The fund tracks the Nomura Japan Equity High Dividend 70 Index, selecting companies with strong dividend payouts. NEXT FUNDS manages this fund.

name: Nikkei225 Bull 2x ETF
summary: This is a leveraged ETF that aims to deliver twice the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 Index. The fund seeks to provide investors with amplified returns based on the movements of the underlying index, targeting short-term trading strategies. It's designed for those seeking to double their exposure to the Nikkei 225's daily gains.

name: Nikkei225 Bear -1x ETF
summary: This is an inverse ETF designed to deliver the opposite of the daily performance of the Nikkei 225 Index. The fund aims to provide investors with a return that moves inversely to the Nikkei 225, allowing them to profit from a market decline. It offers a way to hedge against potential losses in the Japanese stock market.

name: NZAM ETF J-REIT Index
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the J-REIT Index, providing exposure to Japanese Real Estate Investment Trusts. The fund allows investors to participate in the Japanese real estate market through a diversified portfolio of REITs. NZAM (Nikko Asset Management) manages this ETF.

name: NZAM ETF TOPIX Ex-Financials
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the TOPIX Ex-Financials Index. The fund provides exposure to the Japanese stock market, excluding companies in the financial sector. NZAM (Nikko Asset Management) manages this ETF.

name: MAXIS J-REIT ETF
summary: This is an ETF focused on investing in Japanese Real Estate Investment Trusts (J-REITs). The fund aims to track the performance of an index representing the J-REIT market. MAXIS manages this ETF, offering investors exposure to Japanese real estate through publicly traded securities.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Foods
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Foods index.The index invests in fishery, agriculture, forestry and foods sectors. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Raw Mat & Chemicals
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Raw Materials & Chemicals index.The index invests in textiles and apparels, pulp and paper, and chemical sectors. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Pharmaceutical
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Pharmaceutical index.The index invests in the pharmaceutical sector. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Steel and Nonferrous
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Steel & Nonferrous index.The index invests in iron and steel, and nonferrous metals sectors. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 ElecAppl & Precision
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Electric Appliances & Precision Instruments index.The index invests in electric appliances and precision instruments sectors. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Tranport & Logistics
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Transportation & Logistics index.The index invests in land transportation, marine transportation, air transportation, and warehousing and harbor transportation service sectors. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX-17 Comm & Wholesale Trd
summary: The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the TOPIX-17 Commercial & Wholesale Trade index.The index invests in the wholesale trade sector. It is a free-float adjusted market capitalization-weighted index and reflects market movements of the market capitalization to each base market value.

name: Daiwa ETF MSCI Japan Empowering Women Index (WIN)
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the MSCI Japan Empowering Women Index (WIN). The fund focuses on investing in Japanese companies that demonstrate a commitment to gender diversity and women's empowerment. Daiwa Asset Management manages this ETF.

name: Daiwa ETF FTSE Blossom Japan Index
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the FTSE Blossom Japan Index. The fund focuses on investing in Japanese companies that demonstrate strong environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices. Daiwa Asset Management manages this ETF.

name: MAXIS High Yield J-REIT ETF
summary: This is an ETF that focuses on investing in high-yield Japanese Real Estate Investment Trusts (J-REITs). The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the higher-yielding segment of the Japanese real estate market. MAXIS manages this ETF.

name: MAXIS S&P Mitsubishi Group ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to replicate, net of expenses, the S&P Japan Corporate Group Index - Mitsubishi Group Cluster.
 The index comprises all listed members of the Mitsubishi Public Affairs Committee. Changes to the list of Mitsubishi Corporate Group companies between index rebalancings, officially announced or otherwise, will not result in changes to the index until the next rebalancing. There are no market capitalisation or liquidity eligibility requirements.

name: Simplex WTI ETF
summary: This is an ETF that tracks the price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil. The fund provides investors with exposure to the crude oil market through a commodity-backed investment vehicle. Simplex Asset Management manages this ETF.

name: Listed Index Fund International Bond (FTSE WGBI) Monthly Dividend Payment
summary:
The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the Citigroup World Government Bond index (ex-Japan, no hedge, in yen).
 The index invests in government bonds of major countries excluding Japan. It is calculated by converting local-currency based indices into yen without hedging.

name: Listed Index Fund International Developed Countries Equity (MSCI-KOKUSAI)
summary:
The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the MSCI-KOKUSAI index (in yen equivalent).
 The index is composed of equity from mainly the developed countries, excluding Japan stocks (including depositary receipts and country fund).

name: Listed Index Fund International Emerging Countries Equity (MSCI EMERGING)
summary:
The investment seeks to track the price and performance yield, before fees and expenses, of the MSCI EMERGING Markets index (in yen equivalent).
 The index is composed of equity from mainly emerging markets (including depositary receipts and country fund).

name: NEXT NOTES KOSPI200 Leverage ETN
summary: NEXT NOTES KOSPI200 Leverage ETN is an Exchange Traded Note that tracks the leveraged performance of the KOSPI 200 index. The ETN aims to provide investors with twice the daily performance of the KOSPI 200. It is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: NEXT NOTES Tokyo Stock Exchange Mothers Index ETN
summary: NEXT NOTES Tokyo Stock Exchange Mothers Index ETN is an Exchange Traded Note that tracks the performance of the Tokyo Stock Exchange Mothers Index. The ETN aims to provide investors with exposure to emerging growth companies listed on the Mothers section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange. It is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

name: NEXT NOTES STOXX ASEAN-Five Select Dividend 50 (NR-JPY) ETN
summary: NEXT NOTES STOXX ASEAN-Five Select Dividend 50 (NR-JPY) ETN is an Exchange Traded Note that tracks the performance of the STOXX ASEAN-Five Select Dividend 50 Net Return Index. The ETN aims to provide investors with exposure to high-dividend-yielding companies from the five ASEAN countries (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, and the Philippines). It is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and denominated in JPY.

name: NEXT NOTES Niche Top Mid Small Cap Japan Equity, Net Total Return ETN
summary: The investment seeks to track the performance of "FactSet Global Niche Top Japanese Enterprise Index Net Total Return".

name: NEXT FUNDS Japan Bond NOMURA-BPI Exchange Traded Fund
summary: NEXT FUNDS Japan Bond NOMURA-BPI Exchange Traded Fund is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the NOMURA-BPI Japan Government Bond Index. It provides investors with exposure to the Japanese government bond market.

name: NEXT FUNDS International Bond FTSE World Government Bd Idx ex Jpn UnHdg ETF
summary: NEXT FUNDS International Bond FTSE World Government Bd Idx ex Jpn UnHdg ETF is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the FTSE World Government Bond Index ex Japan. It provides investors with exposure to international government bonds, excluding Japan, without currency hedging.

name: NEXT FUNDS International REIT S&P Developed REIT Index (ex Japan UnHdg) ETF
summary: NEXT FUNDS International REIT S&P Developed REIT Index (ex Japan UnHdg) ETF is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the S&P Developed REIT Index (ex Japan). It provides investors with exposure to international real estate investment trusts, excluding Japan, without currency hedging.

name: TSE Mothers ETF
summary: TSE Mothers ETF is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This fund aims to track the performance of companies listed on the Mothers section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, which focuses on high-growth and emerging companies. It offers investors exposure to these smaller, innovative businesses.

name: NEXT FUNDS MSCI Japan Empowering Women Select Index Exchange Traded Fund
summary: NEXT FUNDS MSCI Japan Empowering Women Select Index Exchange Traded Fund is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the MSCI Japan Empowering Women Select Index. It provides exposure to Japanese companies that demonstrate a commitment to empowering women in the workplace.

name: NEXT FUNDS Emerging Market Bond J.P. Morgan EMBI Plus (Unhedged) ETF
summary: NEXT FUNDS Emerging Market Bond J.P. Morgan EMBI Plus (Unhedged) ETF is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the J.P. Morgan EMBI Plus Index. It provides investors with exposure to emerging market bonds without currency hedging.

name: NZAM ETF TOPIX
summary: NZAM ETF TOPIX is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the TOPIX Index, representing the broad Japanese stock market. It seeks to provide investors with diversified exposure to Japanese equities.

name: NZAM ETF Nikkei 225
summary: NZAM ETF Nikkei 225 is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the Nikkei 225 Index, representing 225 of the largest publicly traded companies in Japan. It provides investors with diversified exposure to the Japanese stock market.

name: NZAM ETF JPX-Nikkei400
summary: NZAM ETF JPX-Nikkei400 is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This fund aims to track the performance of the JPX-Nikkei 400 Index. This index selects 400 companies in Japan with high capital efficiency and investor-focused management.

name: NZAM ETF J-REIT Core Index
summary: NZAM ETF J-REIT Core Index is an exchange-traded fund listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to track the performance of the J-REIT Core Index. It provides investors with exposure to Japanese Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs).

name: MAXIS HuaAn China Equity (SSE 180 index) ETF
summary: MAXIS HuaAn China Equity (SSE 180 index) ETF is an exchange-traded fund that aims to track the performance of the SSE 180 Index, providing investors with exposure to a portfolio of leading Chinese companies listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange. The fund is managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd. and seeks to replicate the index by investing in constituent stocks.

name: SMDAM TOPIX ETF
summary: SMDAM TOPIX ETF is an exchange-traded fund managed by Sumitomo Mitsui DS Asset Management Company, Ltd., tracking the TOPIX (Tokyo Stock Price Index), which represents all domestic companies listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the broad Japanese equity market, reflecting the overall performance of the Japanese economy.

name: MAXIS S&P500 US Equity ETF
summary: MAXIS S&P500 US Equity ETF is an exchange-traded fund that seeks to track the performance of the S&P 500 Index, providing investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of 500 of the largest publicly traded companies in the United States. The fund is managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd., and it aims to replicate the index by investing in constituent stocks.

name: MAXIS World Equity (MSCI ACWI) ETF
summary: MAXIS World Equity (MSCI ACWI) ETF is an exchange-traded fund that aims to track the performance of the MSCI ACWI (All Country World Index), providing investors with exposure to a broad range of developed and emerging market equities worldwide. The fund is managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd., seeking to replicate the index by investing in constituent stocks.

name: MAXIS Carbon Efficient Japan Equity ETF
summary: MAXIS Carbon Efficient Japan Equity ETF is an exchange-traded fund that focuses on Japanese equities while considering carbon efficiency, aiming to track an index that selects companies with lower carbon emissions and intensities within the Japanese market. Managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management, it seeks to provide investors with exposure to Japanese stocks that are more environmentally responsible.

name: NZAM ETF S&P/JPX Carbon Efficient Index
summary: NZAM ETF S&P/JPX Carbon Efficient Index is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the S&P/JPX Carbon Efficient Index, providing exposure to Japanese companies selected based on their carbon emissions efficiency relative to their peers. The fund is managed by Nikko Asset Management Co., Ltd. and aims to offer investors a way to invest in Japanese equities while considering environmental sustainability.

name: iFreeETF-Nikkei225(Quarterly Dividend Type)
summary: iFreeETF-Nikkei225(Quarterly Dividend Type) is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the Nikkei 225 Index, comprised of 225 of the largest publicly traded companies in Japan, and distributes dividends on a quarterly basis. Managed by Nomura Asset Management, it offers investors exposure to the Japanese stock market with regular income payouts.

name: iFreeETF-TOPIX(Quarterly Dividend Type)
summary: iFreeETF-TOPIX(Quarterly Dividend Type) is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the TOPIX (Tokyo Stock Price Index), representing all domestic companies listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, and distributes dividends on a quarterly basis. Managed by Nomura Asset Management, it offers investors broad exposure to the Japanese equity market with regular income payouts.

name: iFreeETF China STAR50
summary: iFreeETF China STAR50 is an exchange-traded fund that focuses on investing in companies listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange Science and Technology Innovation Board (STAR Market), which features innovative and high-growth Chinese companies. Managed by Nomura Asset Management, it offers investors exposure to China's technology and innovation sector.

name: iFreeETF China GBA100
summary: iFreeETF China GBA100 is an exchange-traded fund that focuses on investing in the top 100 companies in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macau Greater Bay Area (GBA) of China. Managed by Nomura Asset Management, it provides investors with exposure to the economic growth and development of this key region in China.

name: MAXIS NASDAQ100 ETF
summary: MAXIS NASDAQ100 ETF is an exchange-traded fund that aims to track the performance of the NASDAQ-100 Index, providing investors with exposure to a portfolio of 100 of the largest non-financial companies listed on the NASDAQ Stock Market. The fund is managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd., and it seeks to replicate the index by investing in constituent stocks.

name: MAXIS NASDAQ100 ETF (JPY Hedged)
summary: MAXIS NASDAQ100 ETF (JPY Hedged) is an exchange-traded fund that aims to track the performance of the NASDAQ-100 Index while hedging against fluctuations in the Japanese Yen (JPY) to mitigate currency risk for Japanese investors. Managed by Mitsubishi UFJ Kokusai Asset Management Co., Ltd., it provides exposure to leading NASDAQ companies with currency hedging.

name: Global X MSCI Governance-Quality Japan ETF
summary: Global X MSCI Governance-Quality Japan ETF is an exchange-traded fund that invests in Japanese companies with high environmental, social, and governance (ESG) ratings, with a focus on governance and quality factors. Managed by Global X Japan, it aims to provide investors with exposure to Japanese equities that meet specific ESG criteria.
